_comment: Source of truth for EARNED referring-domain authority over time. Committed to git (unlike the gitignored CSV exports) so the trend survives. Append one snapshot per export via `npm run backlinks:track`. 'Earned' = a referring domain we did NOT create ourselves: it is neither an owned property nor a self-made placement recorded in inventory.json.

snapshots.note: Baseline. Search engines see only 3 real referring domains. The 105 'live' self-made placements in inventory.json (directories, GitHub, gists, Wikidata) are NOT yet indexed as referring domains and NEVER count as wins. POLICY 2026-06-04: self-made backlink creation is HALTED (more self-owned mirrors = SpamBrain link-scheme risk, not authority). Goal: 5-15 NEW real, independent referring domains per month, tracked here as earned_count growth.
